description: Perfect for those casual runners and those who love the treadmill, the reebok Aviator is a stylish looking and comfortable running shoe. Team it with performance clothing when on those healthy runs, and with jeans and tees for casual occasions for that all-day comfort.Upper Meshed upper for maximum ventilation Synthetic overlays for durability, midfoot support and comfort Reinforced toe box and heel overlays for maximum durability, foot support and protection Inner cushioned and meshed fabric bootie for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Lace up system with a tongue loop for a snug, customised fit Padded and meshed tongue and collar for in-step comfort and breathability Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Lightly padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with hexagonal scooped lugs for cushioned comfort, durability and traction Outsole reinforced onto the upper as toe guard shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
